---
title: "SparseAuto: An Auto-scheduler for Sparse Tensor Computations using Recursive Loop Nest Restructuring"
date: 2024-10-08
year: 2024
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3689730"
venue: "OOPSLA 2024"
award: ""
code: "https://zenodo.org/records/12764370"
slides: "files/slides/oopsla2024.key"
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09549"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Adhitha Dias
  - name: Logan Anderson
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Artem Pelenitsyn
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
